SEARCH
Module com.example.sol_eclipsado
Package com.example.sol_eclipsado.model

Class SecretWord

java.lang.Object
com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord
public class SecretWord extends Object
Represents the secret word for the "Sol Eclipsado" game. This class follows a variant of the Singleton pattern to ensure only one secret word exists during the game session. It manages the storage, character mapping, and validation logic required by the game rules.

  • Method Details

    • setSecretWord

      public void setSecretWord(String secretWord)
      Configures the secret word, initializes the discovery array, and stores the word in lowercase for case-insensitive comparisons.
      Parameters:
      secretWord - The string to be set as the game's secret word.

    • getSecretWord

      public String getSecretWord()
      Returns:
      The raw string of the secret word.

    • getSecretWordArray

      public char[] getSecretWordArray()
      Returns:
      A character array containing the secret word in lowercase.

    • getLettersFound

      public static char[] getLettersFound()
      Returns:
      A character array representing the letters correctly guessed by the player.

    • setLettersFound

      public void setLettersFound(int index, char letter)
      Updates the array of found letters at a specific position.
      Parameters:
      index - The position in the word where the letter was found.
      letter - The character to store in the found letters array.

    • getInstance

      public static SecretWord getInstance()
      Retrieves the unique instance of the SecretWord class.
      Returns:
      The Singleton instance of SecretWord.

    • characterValidation

      public static boolean characterValidation()
      Validates if the secret word contains only Latin alphabet characters, including accents and the letter 'ñ'.
      Returns:
      true if the word matches the Latin character criteria, false otherwise.

    • sizeValidation

      public static boolean sizeValidation()
      Validates if the length of the secret word is within the allowed range (between 6 and 12 characters).
      Returns:
      true if the size is valid, false if it is too short or too long.

    • spacingWordValidation

      public static boolean spacingWordValidation()
      Checks if the secret word contains any blank spaces (initial, middle, or final).
      Returns:
      true if spaces are found, false if the word is contiguous.
